method.world: real 2025 draft, period-honest: ADP-only board (synthesized projections), keeper seats pre-filled (explicit flag + implicit ADP-gap rule), xlsx pick attribution for Brian
method.machinery: build_mock_draft_sim bot, 100 sims, temperature 0.25, top-15 softmax, tendency model OFF (it is fit on 2023-25 — using it here would leak the answer)
method.sample: top-150 period-ADP players x 14 Brian live picks

verdict: Directionally right but miscalibrated: Brier 0.102 beats the base rate (0.233), but the 60-80% bucket realizes 58% vs 70% predicted — pad that band before betting a pick on it.
